label: Knowledge category
description: Defines a category for anomaly research knowledge, controlling overflow routing and the UI marker texture shown in the research tab.

overflowCategory.label: Overflow category
overflowCategory.description: KnowledgeCategoryDef that receives excess knowledge points when this category is full. Used by Advanced to route overflow to Basic.

color.label: Color
color.description: RGBA tint applied to the research category marker and related UI elements. Format: (r, g, b, a).

texPath.label: Texture path
texPath.description: Asset path for the research category marker texture shown in the anomaly research tab.

basic-knowledge-category.label: Basic knowledge category
basic-knowledge-category.description: A knowledge category with required fields plus color and texture.
